description: Hemnet is a Swedish property marketplace focused on home listings and buying. The `workers.dev` host appears to be a Cloudflare Workers deployment used for an MCP server rather than a broader public developer platform.
summary: Hemnet exposes a public MCP server at `https://chatgpt-app.hemnet.workers.dev/mcp` over SSE, and no other public developer integration surfaces were found on the given domain.
